_meta.description: Search index chunks for portfolio site. Source of truth for test-llm.html search.

chunks.title: About John Hanacek
chunks.tags: innovator designer creator AI human augmentation design engineer agentic coder san diego california
chunks.content: Design Engineer based in San Diego, California. Focused on AI, human augmentation, and spatial computing. Builds AI-native products, agentic systems, and interactive prototypes. Has been prototyping in code for over a decade.

chunks.title: Contact & Social
chunks.tags: contact email linkedin bluesky twitter social
chunks.content: hi@johnhanacek.com · Bluesky @johnhanacek.bsky.social · LinkedIn /in/johnhanacek · X @johnhanacek

chunks.title: MetaMedium — AI Beyond Chat
chunks.tags: metamedium AI diagrammatic framework shipped product prototype
chunks.content: Shipped interactive web prototype for diagrammatic human-AI communication. Features shape recognition, spatial drawing, and AI-powered canvas. Explores spatial and visual AI interaction beyond text chat.

chunks.title: JH Design LLC — Founding Designer
chunks.tags: consulting UX product design freelance workshops clients startups
chunks.content: Independent design practice since 2016. Serves startups and R&D teams. Current clients include Muse.bio (workshop facilitation, user personas) and stealth AI startups (MVP design, demo prototypes). Works across healthcare, spatial computing, and AI.

chunks.title: Nanome — XR Molecular Design
chunks.tags: nanome XR VR molecular spatial computing unity shipped AI team collaboration
chunks.content: Primary XR designer at Nanome Inc. (2022–2024), a molecular design platform for pharma researchers. Shipped a conversational AI interface for molecular analysis. Prototyped 3D interactions in Unity/C#, ShapesXR, and Blender. Led UX research with scientists. Collaborated closely with the engineering team.

chunks.title: BadVR — Immersive Data Viz
chunks.tags: badvr XR VR AR data visualization hololens quest hand tracking shipped
chunks.content: Immersive UX Designer at BadVR (2021–2022). Shipped hand-tracking interaction systems for Meta Quest and HoloLens 2. Designed AR HUD interfaces for real-time sensor data. Worked cross-functionally with engineering on spatial computing prototypes.

chunks.title: AvatarMEDIC — CEO & Founder
chunks.tags: avatarmedic telepresence robotics medical startup CEO founder leadership team managed
chunks.content: Founding CEO of AvatarMEDIC (2019–2021), a telepresence startup for remote medical training and robotic surgery. Led product strategy, pitching, and concept development. Directed engineering and marketing/website design. Built demo prototypes: HoloTRIAGE, A1R Augmented First Responder, and Robot Digital Twin Control. Founder Institute SF 2020 graduate.

chunks.title: HoloTRIAGE — Medical XR
chunks.tags: holotriage medical XR hololens triage healthcare AR training hackathon winner shipped
chunks.content: HoloLens 2 medical training system with holographic interface for triage assessment and decision support. Won Microsoft Reactor Hackathon (2020). Built with Unity and mixed reality toolkits.

chunks.title: Robot Digital Twin Control
chunks.tags: robotics digital twin XR control aerospace award shipped built
chunks.content: XR-based robot arm control using a digital twin interface. Won the R&D Innovation Award from the Aerospace Medical Association (2022).

chunks.title: Skills & Tools
chunks.tags: skills tools figma unity blender claude code prototyping shapesxr coding agentic
chunks.content: Agentic coding: Claude Code, OpenCode, LMStudio. Creative coding: JavaScript, HTML/CSS, p5.js, Processing, WebGL, WebGPU. Prototyping: Unity/C#, Blender, ShapesXR. Design: Figma, Adobe Suite. Knowledge management: Obsidian, Coda. 10+ years building interactive prototypes in code.

chunks.title: Earth Star — Worldbuilding
chunks.tags: earth star worldbuilding speculative regenerative futures AI creativity
chunks.content: Worldbuilding project exploring a positive future grounded in tradition and technology. Includes an autonomous creativity and research system combining AI with original art. Features an original painting from 2025.

chunks.title: Interactive Installations
chunks.tags: art installation interactive leap motion kinect godish creative coding
chunks.content: Godish (2015): Leap Motion installation where hand hover triggers lightning video. God Like (2016): Microsoft Kinect full-body version, collaboration with Nathan Danskey. Both are creative coding projects for physical interactive experiences.

chunks.title: Influence — Audiovisual Art
chunks.tags: influence installation meditation processing p5js georgetown creative coding
chunks.content: Audiovisual installation at Georgetown Media Fest (2016). Meditation on light and sound. Originally coded in Processing, later rewritten in p5.js for web. Live at jhana.zone.

chunks.title: Fractal Futures — Sci-Fi Writing
chunks.tags: writing fiction science fiction stories worldbuilding substack futures
chunks.content: Original science fiction stories about technology futures. Published on Substack, Gumroad, and Amazon Kindle.

chunks.title: Photography & Multimedia
chunks.tags: photography multimedia 3d scanning illustration animation visual art hobby professional camera
chunks.content: Photography is both a professional skill and personal hobby. Editorial, portrait, and landscape work. Also works across interactive installation, VR/AR, digital illustration, 3D scanning/modeling, and animation/rendering.

chunks.title: JH Coaching OS — AI Product
chunks.tags: coaching AI agent LLM shipped product built system dashboard
chunks.content: Designed and shipped an AI coaching product that adapts to each client's business. Features include personalized AI agent, curated materials, context docs, and live dashboard. Built end-to-end from concept through working software.

chunks.title: Coaching Packages
chunks.tags: coaching packages retainer sprint audit consulting engagement
chunks.content: Guided Coaching (4 sessions over 2 months), Embedded Retainer (ongoing), Build Sprint (1–2 week intensive), Audit (one-session deep dive). Helps clients go from zero to building with AI.

chunks.title: Design & Product Services
chunks.tags: services design product workshops research strategy engineering prototype
chunks.content: Workshop facilitation (journey mapping, personas, design thinking). User research. Strategy and vision. 0-to-1 design, design engineering, AI product integration, design systems architecture. Builds working demos and prototypes in code.

chunks.title: Georgetown — MA in CCT
chunks.tags: education masters thesis research georgetown AI conversational
chunks.content: MA in Communication, Culture & Technology from Georgetown University (2014–2016). Thesis on AI-powered conversational interfaces. Second thesis on technology standardization. Awarded 'Most Meta' for interdisciplinary thinking.

chunks.title: UC San Diego — BA
chunks.tags: education bachelors ucsd political science robotics
chunks.content: BA in Political Science / International Relations from UC San Diego (2008–2012). Thesis on remotely piloted aircraft and just war theory, including ground robotics.

chunks.title: Awards & Recognition
chunks.tags: awards innovation aerospace nist microsoft founder institute accomplishment won
chunks.content: R&D Innovation Award from Aerospace Medical Association (2022) for robot digital twin. NIST CHARIoT Phase 2 Winner (2021). Microsoft Reactor Hackathon Winner (2020) for HoloTRIAGE. Founder Institute Graduate, SF 2020. 'Most Meta' award from Georgetown CCT (2016).

chunks.title: Areas of Expertise
chunks.tags: expertise skills AI XR robotics design product LLM agent coding prototyping
chunks.content: Design & Product: User Research, Interaction Design, Product Design, Design Systems. AI & Dev: LLM Integration, Agent Orchestration, Conversational UX, Intelligence Augmentation. Works across AI, XR, and physical computing. Prototypes in code and collaborates directly with engineering teams.

chunks.title: Career Timeline
chunks.tags: career work history nanome badvr avatarmedic jh design collaborate georgetown
chunks.content: Nanome (2022–24): XR designer, shipped AI features. BadVR (2021–22): immersive UX, shipped hand-tracking. AvatarMEDIC (2019–21): founding CEO, led product strategy and concept development. JH Design LLC (2016–present): founding designer. Collaborate.org (2015–18). Georgetown CNDLS (2014–15).

chunks.title: Research & Publications
chunks.tags: research publications thesis edulearn atlantic council predicted AI
chunks.content: Masters thesis: Art Math, Math Art. EduLearn 2015 Barcelona: technology adoption research. Atlantic Council publication 'Internet as Answer Engine' predicted ChatGPT-style systems years before they existed. Featured in Kevin Kelly's Technium and HuffPost.

chunks.title: Agentic Coding & Prototyping
chunks.tags: code coding agentic prototype creative javascript html css p5js unity webgl engineer technical build
chunks.content: Design Engineer who writes code. 10+ years across creative coding, XR prototyping, and now agentic development. Builds with AI coding tools, Claude Code for main features, OpenCode for maintenance. Comfortable in whatever the problem calls for, JavaScript, Unity/C#, Python, WebGL/WebGPU, p5.js. This portfolio site features a physics-based fish ecosystem, interactive canvases, and in-browser LLM search.

chunks.title: Leadership & Teams
chunks.tags: leadership team managed led CEO founder cross-functional collaboration
chunks.content: Founding CEO of AvatarMEDIC: led product strategy, pitching, concept development, engineering direction, and marketing/website design. Lead designer at Nanome: drove XR platform design, collaborated with engineers and scientists. Runs client engagements and workshops through JH Design LLC. Works cross-functionally with engineers, researchers, and product managers.

chunks.title: Shipped AI Products
chunks.tags: shipped AI products built delivered LLM agent launched output
chunks.content: Four shipped AI products: (1) JH Coaching OS, an adaptive AI agent system with dashboard. (2) Nanome conversational AI for molecular analysis. (3) MetaMedium, an interactive AI canvas for diagrammatic communication. (4) In-browser LLM search on this portfolio site using WebGPU-powered Qwen running locally.

chunks.title: What Makes John Unique
chunks.tags: unique differentiator rare combination why hire valuable standout special person human
chunks.content: Career built toward intelligence augmentation, from XR design and robotics research to AI and agentic systems. The early work was about augmenting humans physically, now it's about augmenting them cognitively. Georgetown thesis explored AI-powered interfaces years before ChatGPT existed. Has product leadership experience, hands-on design skills, and real coding ability.

chunks.title: Design Process
chunks.tags: process methodology design thinking research prototype iterate user-centered approach
chunks.content: Starts with research, user interviews, competitive analysis, understanding the problem space. Then rapid prototyping in code and design tools at the same time. Builds working demos and tests with real users. Short cycles, ships early and often. Runs design thinking workshops alongside technical prototyping.

chunks.title: Personal — Cooking & Food
chunks.tags: cooking food personal hobby kitchen recipe albondigas tahdig pasta fish brownie home
chunks.content: Enjoys cooking as a hobby. Some go-to dishes include albondigas soup, rice tahdig, leek-anchovy-lemon pasta, and whole fish on the grill. Has a brownie recipe memorized from scratch.

chunks.title: Personal — Gardening & Outdoors
chunks.tags: gardening native plants california outdoors hiking camping nature san diego garden personal hobby
chunks.content: Gardens with a focus on native California plants in San Diego. Hikes and camps regularly. Ecosystems, growth patterns, adaptation, it all connects to how he thinks about design, but mostly it's just good to be outside.

chunks.title: Location & Lifestyle
chunks.tags: san diego california location live based where lifestyle SoCal southern california
chunks.content: Based in San Diego, California. UCSD alum who stayed. Lifestyle balances tech work with outdoor hobbies: native plant gardening, hiking, camping, and photography across Southern California landscapes.

chunks.title: Beliefs & Philosophy
chunks.tags: believe philosophy values principles mindset optimism imagination infinite games augmentation conviction worldview
chunks.content: Imagination is within reality. Infinite Games are more powerful than Finite Games. Technology can augment human intelligence and collaboration. Optimism and pessimism are self-fulfilling prophecies — we can choose better prophecies.

chunks.title: This Website — Architecture & Tech
chunks.tags: site website portfolio how built made technology stack architecture special unique framework vanilla javascript html css
chunks.content: Portfolio built with Claude Code (main features) and OpenCode (smaller maintenance), no frameworks, no build tools, no npm. Each page is a standalone HTML file with vanilla JavaScript, shared CSS design system (Deep Sea Terminal theme), and Google Fonts. Features include: an interactive fish minigame with autonomous AI behaviors and real-time physics on the homepage canvas, a blueprint drawing canvas with shape recognition on the design page, a three-tier AI search system (BM25 keyword search, in-browser Qwen 3.5 via WebGPU, and local LMStudio/Ollama support), shape-based geometric navigation, an infinite-canvas playground with pan/zoom, and a cosmos starfield on the art page. Search overlay accessible from any page via ⌘K. Hosted on GitHub Pages.

chunks.title: Fish Minigame — Interactive Canvas
chunks.tags: fish game minigame interactive canvas draw drawing hero homepage spawn ecosystem aquatic coral jellyfish food
chunks.content: The homepage hero is an interactive aquatic ecosystem. Draw shapes on the canvas to spawn entities: loops become fish (small, medium, or large based on size), squares become coral, triangles become jellyfish, circles become bubbles, and taps drop food pellets. Fish have layered autonomous behaviors including edge avoidance, schooling formations, territorial challenges, predator fleeing, and coral homecoming. Press D for debug view. Touch and mouse supported.

chunks.title: AI Search System
chunks.tags: search AI LLM qwen webgpu lmstudio ollama minisearch bm25 browser local model inference
chunks.content: Three-tier search with progressive enhancement. Tier 1: MiniSearch BM25 instant keyword search, always on. Tier 2: Qwen 3.5 (0.8B parameters) running entirely in-browser via WebGPU and Transformers.js — no server needed. Tier 3: auto-detects local LMStudio or Ollama models on localhost for higher quality answers. Also supports custom OpenAI-compatible endpoints. Engine color coding: WebGPU blue, LMStudio purple, Ollama orange, Custom green. AI can be toggled on or off by the user.
